CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Petition
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANNIE DAHER, ESQ., 415.398.6000, FOR DEFENDANTS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, MORGAN STANLEY & CO. INC. and MORGAN STANLEY DW INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, MORGAN STANLEY & CO. INC. and MORGAN STANLEY DW INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
